data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of calculating the discount percentage, but there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need to calculate discount percentages, but the evidence does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this calculation is being performed. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage as the necessary checks were not executed or documented.
gaps: No evidence of discount percentage calculation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
